name: CV Hero
description: Three-column hero — left: yellow star mark; center: name tag, big H1 with accent dot, lede; right: contact key/value list. A bottom strip of stat highlights below.

field_schema.label: Mono name tag
field_schema.help: Short mono label above the name (e.g. // available · b2b).

field_schema.label: Name
field_schema.help: Single-line H1 — kept on one line at desktop.

field_schema.label: Right column key/value
field_schema.help: Each row renders as <mono>label</mono> + value (optional URL).

sub_fields.label: Label
sub_fields.help: Mono label (e.g. loc, hrs, mail, tel).

sub_fields.label: Value
sub_fields.help: Plain text or anchor text when URL provided.

sub_fields.label: URL
sub_fields.help: Optional. When set, value becomes a link.

field_schema.label: Stat strip
field_schema.help: Highlights below the hero. Bold count + label.

test_data.name: Jane Developer
test_data.sub: Senior full-stack dev. A decade of shipping production code — now wiring AI, MCP and agents on top of it.
